title: All 30 Dow stocks are falling, led by Boeing, Salesforce and Disney
text: Shares of all 30 components of the Dow Jones Industrial Average DJIA, +0.33% are trading lower in Friday's premarket, as Dow futures YM00, -1.15% took a hit after strong consumer spending data worried investors the Federal Reserve could raise rates more and for longer. The Dow's biggest decliner was Boeing Co.'s stock BA, +1.15% , which dropped 3.9% ahead of the open after The Wall Street Journal reported that aerospace giant halted deliveries of 787 Dreamliners because of a documentation issue.

title: Hold Dow Inc.: As Economic Conditions Improve So Will Its Stock
text: Dow stock is, in our opinion, worth holding despite moderate prospects for an economic recovery. Dow's products are used in nearly every manufactured-goods of modern-day life. The overwhelming consensus is to hold the stock, as it climbed from $50 to ~$60. It has the potential to climb higher if the economy improves more than expected.
